name: @edgecommons/edge-console-workspace
description: Edge Console workspace: Rust gateway, React/TypeScript UI, and shared browser protocol.

scripts.build: npm run build -w protocol && npm run build -w ui && npm run build:gateway
scripts.build:gateway: npm run link:rust && cargo build -p edge-console-gateway --release
scripts.test: npm run test -w protocol && npm run test -w ui
